news.t: Elle Caruso Fitzgerald from ETF Investment Channel Announces Publication of "Fidelity Adds Managed Futures ETF to Alternatives Lineup"

overview.description: The Fidelity Managed Futures ETF (FFUT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed alternative fund that seeks capital appreciation through a managed futures strategy of various asset classes. The fund aims to capture persistent price trends observed across the market. FFUT was launched on Jun 3, 2025 and is issued by Fidelity.
